title: Job Opening Teacher at Career Launcher

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Career Launcher
jsonLd.description:
Join the Career Launcher family as a Teacher in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Career Launcher:
Career Launcher is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher!
